headlines.headline: Zelval Energy loses key contract in Europe to competitor

sentiment.reasoning: Losing a key contract will negatively impact revenue and market share for Zelval Energy.

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy files for regulatory approval of new cloud infrastructure offering

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy wins industry award for excellence in digital payments

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods completes strategic acquisition to strengthen automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a strategic acquisition aims to strengthen automated logistics, suggesting potential for operational efficiencies and market expansion, but also integration risks.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods wins industry award for excellence in data analytics

sentiment.reasoning: Winning an industry award can enhance reputation and brand image, potentially leading to increased customer trust and future business, but has no direct financial impact.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods reports 7% increase in customer acquisition

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
